case_title: PATEL, RAMESH P. vs. KIRK, JOHNELL et al

docket_entries.description: WRITTEN AUTHORIZATION FROM OWNER FOR APPEARANCE ON THEIR BEHALF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMESH P.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMESH P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIRK, JOHNELL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 SIXTH ST #331, LEASE FORFEITED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT KIRK, JOHNELL
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMESH P. AS TO DEFENDANT KIRK, JOHNELL DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMESH P. SERVED JAN-27-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KIRK, JOHNELL
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMESH P. AS TO DEFENDANT KIRK, JOHNELL
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KIRK, JOHNELL
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $8.67 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMESH P.
